headline: US Lowers Tariffs to Boost Investment in Industrial Economy
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The White House said it will reduce tariffs on farm and construction equipment such as harvesters and forklifts, in an effort to boost investment in the industrial economy through next year.Most Read from BloombergRussia Finance Officials Tell Putin War Spending Is UnaffordableCanada Dips Into Technical Recession for First Time Since 2020Alphabet to Raise $80 Billion in Equity for AI SpendingUS Says Deals With Iran for Safe Hormuz Transit Are ProhibitedAndrew Left Found Guilty in
